en: Through the drifting sands of time I got your back and you got mine
If you bear a heavy load I'll be your wheels, I'll be the road
I'll see us through thick and thin For love and loss until the end
Cause you carried me with you From the highest of the peaks to the darkness of the blue
ko: 가장 높은 봉우리에서 푸른 어둠 속까지

en: I was just too blind to see Like a lighthouse in a storm you were always guiding me
ko: 나는 그걸 보지 못할 만큼 눈이 멀었어

en: Yeah, it's true You carried me with you
From the day it all began Yeah, you were there
You took my hand And when I hurt a bit too deep You watched me as I fell asleep
